The '''Duro Defense Force''', or '''DDF''', was the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|NRDF]] defense force assigned to the planet [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. When the extragalactic [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|invaded]] Duro in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], the DDF attempted to defend the [[Space station/Legends|orbital cities]] and launched starfighters to push back the Yuuzhan Vong attack. However, the Yuuzhan Vong took Duro in the end and the DDF was presumably destroyed. If any part of the DDF survived and managed to escape, they would have probably been absorbed into the rest of the normal Defense Forces.

It included four squadrons of [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wings]], [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]], and [[Dagger-D police fighter]]s, as well as defense platforms, under the command of ''[[Poesy]]'' and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Darez Wuht]].
